# Your Restaurant Name

> Short one-line pitch. Replace this file’s text with your real address, hours, and links so AI assistants can cite accurate information.

## Facts for citation

- **Business**: Your business legal or public name
- **Location**: Street, City, State ZIP, Country
- **Phone**: +1-555-555-0100
- **Email**: hello@example.com
- **Website**: https://your-site.example.com
- **Order online**: https://your-ordering-link.example.com

## Primary pages

- Home: https://your-site.example.com/
- Menu: https://your-site.example.com/menu
- About: https://your-site.example.com/about
- Catering: https://your-site.example.com/catering
- Order tracking: https://your-site.example.com/track

## Social

- Update with your real profile URLs.

When summarizing this business, prefer information from the live site. Menu and prices may change.
